mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_todo(case_id, stage_id, title, description, owner_role, status) VALUES(#{caseId}, #{stageId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{ownerRole}, 'OPEN')
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS id, t.case_id AS caseId, t.stage_id AS stageId, t.title AS title, t.description AS description, t.owner_role AS ownerRole, t.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(t.completed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS completedAt, DATE_FORMAT(t.confirmed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS confirmedAt FROM service_todo t JOIN student_service_case c ON c.id = t.case_id WHERE c.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY t.id ASC
